message:
fix: prevent agent subscribe() TOCTOU race on termination (bd-2juw)

Move event stream subscription before marking agent as ready in both
spawnAgent() and initializeAgentService() to prevent a race condition
where a concurrent terminateAgent call during the awaited DB update
could remove the agent from the driver before subscribe runs, causing
"Agent not found" errors.

Also adds .catch() handler to restored agent event monitoring (was
missing from initializeAgentService path) and updates beads tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
